questionHtml: Calculations using the data of the experiment show that g = 9.71622 m s−2 with a percentage uncertainty of 8 %. Determine the value of g that can be obtained from this experiment. Include the absolute uncertainty in g to one significant figure.

meta.title: Calculations using the data of the experiment show that g = 9.71622 m s−2 with a percentage uncertainty of 8 %. Determine the value of g that can be obtained from this experiment.
